profile.name: Cole Ends
profile.resumeText: Operations, customer success, technical support, sales, retention, workforce operations, leadership, escalation handling, and ATLAS automation builder.
profile.linkedinText: Founder of Avery Industries LLC and builder of ATLAS systems with experience in support, retention, operations, and revenue protection.
